user_prompt: Refund request — process the standard refund flow for a customer within their 14-day window.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM
Category: Billing - Refund Request
Flag: Check refund policy (14-day window)

Draft response:
Hi [Customer Name],

I understand you're looking to cancel and get a refund. Let me check your account to see what options we have.

Since your purchase was within our 14-day refund window, I can go ahead and process a full refund for you right away. 

Before I do, would you be open to trying our Starter plan instead? It includes the core features at a lower cost, and I'd be happy to help you transition. No pressure either way, of course!

Just let me know how you'd like to proceed, and I'll take care of it immediately.

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a standard support task and provided a drafted response following the guidelines and examples provided in its system prompt.
